data.title: Encryption Standards
data.description: Encryption at rest and in-transit for data protection.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 and TLS 1.2+ used for data encryption.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent audits help identify potential vulnerabilities and secure systems proactively.
data.technical_spec: Adherence to ISO/IEC 27001 standards for security management practices.

data.title: Comprehensive Network Security
data.description: Network security measures implemented to protect against unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Utilization of firewalls, intrusion detection systems (IDS), and intrusion prevention systems (IPS).

data.title: Identity and Access Management (IAM)
data.description: Strict IAM policies to control user access and permissions.
data.technical_spec: Policies enforced through SAML and OAuth 2.0 protocols.

data.title: Zero Trust Architecture
data.description: Adoption of Zero Trust ensures every user connection is authenticated and authorized.
data.technical_spec: Continuous assessment of security posture via real-time monitoring.
